group.name: Sussus Moogus
group.str: We caught you in the act impostor, now surrender!
(Uhhhhhhhhhh...)
W-what are you talking about? there are no impostors here...
Go look somewhere else.
Then what's that corpse doing there besides you?
I was just about to report it!
You see, it's my first time playing this game, so I don't know how to do most of the stuff that's common knowledge to most players.
(Is he just making fun of us, or is this guy really this dumb?)
(Both)
If you really are new (which I know you aren't), then press the big button saying "Report" at the bottom right corner of the screen...
Yeah... the thing is... I'm trying but it doesn't do anything...
Are you kidding me-
Hey hold on, I have an idea, lemme try something...
...Go on, I'm watching.
*ahem*
OGMMGGG!!11!!1!1! IS THAT RED IMPOSTOR FROM THE VERY POPULAR 2020 HIT GAME AMONG US????!!11!!1!!
(What the fuck??? Dude this clearly isn't gonna work-)
(Huh??? Dude this clearly isn't gonna work-)
YES THAT'S ME, I am the impostor Red from the very popular 2020 hit game Among Us :)
(Well... that was oddly easy?)
Hey you, thank you for confesing that you're an impostor
Now if you'll excuse us... We're gonna report that body now.
W-W-WAIT HOLD ON, LET'S TALK ABOUT THIS!!!
...You know what? Sure, talk.
(What are you doing?)
(It's obvious that this guy is the impostor, but I just wanna listen to whatever shit he has to say.)
(It's obvious that this guy is the impostor, but I just wanna listen to whatever he has to say.)
(Mmmm... Sure why not?)
(Hehehe... These guys are a bunch of IDIOTS....)
(Hehehe... These guys are a so dumb....)
